title: diphasium flabelliforme
intro: Diphasium flabelliforme, also known as the club fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Hymenophyllaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Diphasium flabelliforme are believed to include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the recovery from respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
